case_title: BANK OF AMERICA N.A. VS. XING L HUANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: RESEARCH TO DETERMINE MILITARY STATUS OF DEFENDANT(S); NOTICE PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 1033(B)(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 17052047) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUANG, XING L $7,190.67 PRINCIPAL, $294.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,485.17, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 17052047)
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA N.A.
